title: save_block_state atomically commits tree, witnesses, and scan_tip together
description: scanner.rs scan_block and db.rs save_block_state wrap tree snapshot, all witness updates, and the scan tip advance in a single SQLite transaction. This is the correct design: splitting any pair would allow a crash to leave the DB with tip advanced but witnesses stale (or vice versa), causing permanently unspendable notes or double-scanned blocks. A future contributor might suggest splitting for simplicity or performance. The atomic write must be preserved.
